sample_recalls.description: This recall involves the plastic dumbbell toy sold with the Fisher-Price Baby Biceps Gift Set. The bar of the dumbbell toy is gray with orange and red plastic weights on each side. The model number GJD49 is located on the back of the kettlebell toy in the gift set.
hazards: The gray caps on the end of the dumbbell toy can come off, posing a choking hazard to infants.
injuries: The firm has received seven reports in the United States of the ends of the dumbbell coming off of the product. No injuries have been reported.
products: Dumbbell toy sold with Baby Biceps Gift Set
units: About 366,200 (In addition, about 37,850 were sold in Canada)

sample_recalls.description: This recall involves the plastic Donald Duck and Daisy Duck figures sold in the Fisher-Price Little People Mickey and Friends figure pack, models HPJ88 and HTW75. hazards: The heads of the Donald Duck and Daisy Duck figures can detach, posing a choking hazard to young children.
injuries: Fisher-Price has received three reports of the heads detaching from the Donald Duck or Daisy Duck figures, including one report of a detached head in the mouth of a young child. No injuries have been…
products: Fisher-Price Little People Mickey and Friends Figures
units: About 204,000 (In addition, about 11,000 were sold in Canada)

top_hazards.label: The battery chargers can overheat and damage the XBOX ONE video game controller, posing a burn hazard to consumers.

sample_recalls.title: Battery Chargers for XBOX ONE Video Game Controllers Recalled by Performance Designed Products Due to Burn Hazard
sample_recalls.description: This recall involves Energizer® XBOX ONE 2X Smart Chargers used to charge XBOX ONE video game controllers. The chargers are black plastic and measure about 3.5 inches long, 5 inches wide and 11 inches tall. "Energizer®" is printed on the charger's label. Item number 048-052-NA is printed on the bottom of the chargers.…
hazards: The battery chargers can overheat and damage the XBOX ONE video game controller, posing a burn hazard to consumers.
injuries: The company has received 24 reports of the chargers overheating and deforming the charger's plastic cover, including 6 reports of chargers emitting a burning odor. No injuries have been reported.
